summary: Persist auth set-token values to the Namecheap api_key config field and clear query-auth credentials on logout.
reason: The generated OAuth-style access_token field is not used by Namecheap request preparation; persisted keys must land in api_key.
validated_outcome: TestAuthSetTokenPersistsNamecheapAPIKey verifies auth set-token writes api_key and leaves access_token empty.
